messages.content: "Please confirm at what time you would like Mukhtar Khan to come for the meeting" paraphrase this text message
"Kindly provide the preferred timing for Mukhtar Khan to attend the meeting."
“Kindly provide the preferred timing for Mukhtar Khan to attend the meeting.” please edit this text message
"Please confirm the time that works best for Mukhtar Khan to attend the meeting."
“could you please confirm the time for Mukhtar Khan to attend the meeting.” paraphrase this text message
"Can you please verify the meeting time for Mukhtar Khan?"
"Could you please confirm the preferred time for Mukhtar Khan to come to the meeting at your residence?" Paraphrase this text message
"Can you please confirm the time Mukhtar Khan should attend the meeting at your place?"
“Can you please confirm the time Mukhtar Khan should come to attend the meeting at your place" paraphrase this text message
"Please confirm the meeting time for Mukhtar Khan at your location."
"Mukhtar Khan will be there at 10:30am" paraphrase this text message
"Mukhtar Khan plans to arrive at 10:30am."
"Mukhtar Khan will be there at 10:30am" pls edit this text message
"Mukhtar Khan will attend at 10:30am."

"Also remind to update on Ramadan pacts .
Need also to diribute something xtra on Monday" Please make a reply of this message
"Will do. Please ensure to provide updates on Ramadan packages. Also, remember to distribute additional items on Monday."
"Just a reminder about the Ramadan hamper. You expressed interest in distributing some extra ones." Paraphrase this text message
"Just a friendly reminder about the Ramadan hamper. You mentioned wanting to distribute some additional ones."
"Shahzad Baber (safe guy) is saying that hw will come tomorrow morning at 11am and he will also bring the new draws as well, please advise"  paraphrase this text message
"Shahzad Baber, the reliable individual, mentioned that he will arrive tomorrow morning at 11am and will also bring the new drawings. Please provide guidance."
"Shahzad Baber plans to arrive tomorrow morning at 11 a.m. and will also bring the person to fix the new drawers. Please provide instructions." Please edit this text message
"Shahzad Baber intends to arrive tomorrow morning at 11 a.m. and will also be bringing the individual to install the new drawers. Kindly provide instructions."
"Yes these are two different colors and both for Kawaljeet" paraphrase this text message
"Yes, these are two distinct colors, both intended for Kawaljeet."
"You need to co- ordinate with Bukhari & then confirm" Please make a reply of this message
"I will coordinate with Bukhari and then confirm."
"I've already confirmed with Bukhari, and he'll attend tomorrow at 1 p.m." Paraphrase this text message
"I have already coordinated with Bukhari, and he will be present tomorrow at 1 p.m."
"Yes, these are two identical outfits in different colors, both meant for Kawaljeet." Please edit this text message
"Yes, these are two identical garments, just in different colors, both designated for Kawaljeet."
“Yes, these are two identical garments, just in different colors, both designated for Kawaljeet" paraphrase this text message
"Yes, these are two matching items, just in different colors, both intended for Kawaljeet."
"Yes, these are two same outfits in different colors, both ordered by Kawaljeet." Paraphrase this text message
"Yes, these are two identical garments in different colors, both purchased by Kawaljeet."

"Spoken to Master and he is saying that it's easier for him to come to the office directly as your house is not in the route of his bus from the office he will come to your house in the morning" paraphrase this text message
"Master has been informed that it's more convenient for him to come directly to the office, as your house is not along his bus route. He will visit your house in the morning."
"Master Sb will be there tomorrow morning around 9:30am" paraphrase this text message
"Master Sb plans to arrive tomorrow morning at approximately 9:30am."

"Younus is expected to arrive tomorrow morning at approximately 9:30am."
